topic: No guided on-ramp into a new genre
unmet_need: Staged, goal-based exploration that coaches you into a genre
top_keywords: new; want; actually; genre; recommendations; love
example_quote: DJ sucks. Love the recommendation algorithm in "DJ", but hate the ai dj. Would love it if we had the option to turn him off

topic: Stuck in a listening loop / same songs on repeat
unmet_need: Gentle nudges that expand the rotation without losing comfort
research_question: Q4 repeat-listening of the same content
top_keywords: want; songs; comfort; repeat; days; loop
example_quote: As a busy parent with two kids I have no time or energy to crate dig. I just want low-effort discovery that comes to me.

unmet_need: A clear bridge explaining why a track fits your existing taste
top_keywords: trust; shuffle; like; recommendations; app; recommendation
example_quote: Honestly when a recommendation explains why a track fits my taste, I trust it so much more. The 'why' is everything.

topic: New music never sticks (discovery without adoption)
unmet_need: Reinforcement that converts a first play into a lasting habit
research_question: Q4 / core: adoption, not one-off plays
top_keywords: new; artists; radar; release; rotation; discovery
example_quote: As an aspirational explorer I save tons of new music and forget all of it. Retention and rotation are the real unmet need.

topic: Discovery surfaces don't lead anywhere new
unmet_need: Discovery that introduces artists you'd never have found yourself
top_keywords: discover; weekly; discover weekly; week; artists; playlist
example_quote: discover weekly used to find me artists i'd never have found myself. now it's all safe picks i already know. discovery is broken
